videos.title: #sundayservices
videos.description:
Special Service this Sunday 24th of May at 10AM prompt.

Theme " *Annionting Present to Deliver and Liberate"* 

There is an annionting present to Deliver and Liberate you from stuff that has plagued you for years and break every chain.

●Invite someone, bring them and you come expectant.

How God annionted Jesus that He went about doing good and healing all that were oppressed for God was with Him.

*VENUE - Harris Academy South Norwood, Cumberlow Avenue, South Norwood, London SE25 6AE*


Share this pls!!!!
